subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #068 Two Kinds of Fate
subcodes.first_line: Fate is of two kinds: one is irrevocable and the other is conditional, or, as it is said, impending.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قضا دو قسم است یکی محتوم است و دیگری مشروط که معلق گفته میشود
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @law of cause and effect, @life and death, @wisdom [hikmat]
